calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David B. Draheim, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Ron A. Bergman, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Brian H. Martin, dba Brian Martin Productions.
Default was entered against defendant on January 16, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 20, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Ron A. Bergman, and against the Defaulted Defendant Brian H. Martin, dba Brian Martin Productions, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $67,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $785.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $68,285.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
